title: Not Enough Optimizations
description: maximum fps modpack without sacrificing vanilla features
body:
This Is a pure performance modpack that includes a few QoL mods, made to give you a high ammount of fps while playing no different from vanilla mc. This modpack is good standalone, but it is also a great start for your own modpack. message me if you have questions or comments.

NEOM Lite is [found here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/neom-lite)


<details>
<summary>A note for modpack creators</summary>
if you make and publish a modpack based off one of mine, Give me attribution, and I would love a message so I could see your modpack. as of 1.3, this modpack has been created to be mainly standalone. some configs in certain mods may crash when paired with another mod. if this happens to you, the problem is likely the moonrise, exordium, noxesium, forcegl, threatengl, modernfix or servercore mods or in their configs.
</details>
